mapper.select: SELECT name, address, website, contact, phone, mobile, email, description, remark FROM bookstore_info WHERE name = #{name}
SELECT name, address, website, contact, phone, mobile, email, description, remark FROM bookstore_info
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bookstore_info (name, address, website, contact, phone, mobile, email, description, remark) VALUES (#{name}, #{address}, #{website}, #{contact}, #{phone}, #{mobile}, #{email}, #{description}, #{remark})
